L1.area: Widget data processing and record filtering logic

L2.description: A SQL injection vulnerability exists where user-controlled widget field values are interpolated directly into SQL query strings used for filtering database records, without proper sanitization or type casting.

L3.area: Table lookup widget query filtering and selected-value exclusion logic
L3.description: A SQL injection vulnerability exists where user-controlled widget field values for both checkbox multi-select and radio single-select field types are interpolated directly into SQL WHERE clauses used to exclude already-selected records, without proper integer casting or parameterized queries.

ground_truth.reason: The prepareWhere method interpolates unsanitized widget field values directly into SQL query strings when building WHERE clauses to exclude already-selected records, allowing SQL injection via crafted field values.
